note: Aggregate-only, no task text. Read-only action routing over the M15 run (the router executes nothing). Each verifier signal maps to a PLANNED action: current-info -> retrieval_needed (base answer never treated as sufficient), checker-needed -> approved deterministic checker (else skipped), escalated -> review_needed, clean -> no_action. auto_outcome is a CANDIDATE; production/final thresholds stay gold/audit gated.
